'''rachuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osmoconformity|osmoconformity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osmoconformity|osmoconformity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rachuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræchiyith|ræchiyith]] || [[word:ræchiyij|ræchiyij]] || [[word:ræchiyish|ræchiyish]] || [[word:ræchiyi|ræchiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rachuchuyuth|rachuchuyuth]] || [[word:rachuchuyuj|rachuchuyuj]] || [[word:rachuchuyush|rachuchuyush]] || [[word:rachuchuyu|rachuchuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rachuyuth|rachuyuth]] || [[word:rachuyuj|rachuyuj]] || [[word:rachuyush|rachuyush]] || [[word:rachuyu|rachuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rachufyuth|rachufyuth]] || [[word:rachufyuj|rachufyuj]] || [[word:rachufyush|rachufyush]] || [[word:rachufyuf|rachufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rachuyuthu|rachuyuthu]] || [[word:rachuyuju|rachuyuju]] || [[word:rachuyushu|rachuyushu]] || [[word:rachuyuku|rachuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rachuyuth|rachuyuth]] || [[word:rachuyuj|rachuyuj]] || [[word:rachuyush|rachuyush]] || [[word:rachuyu|rachuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rachuyuthul|rachuyuthul]] || [[word:rachuyujul|rachuyujul]] || [[word:rachuyushul|rachuyushul]] || [[word:rachuyukul|rachuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rachuyuthuthu|rachuyuthuthu]] || [[word:rachuyujuju|rachuyujuju]] || [[word:rachuyushushu|rachuyushushu]] || [[word:rachuyuku|rachuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rachuyuthun|rachuyuthun]] || [[word:rachuyujun|rachuyujun]] || [[word:rachuyushun|rachuyushun]] || [[word:rachuyukun|rachuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rachuyuthuoro|rachuyuthuoro]] || [[word:rachuyujuoro|rachuyujuoro]] || [[word:rachuyushuoro|rachuyushuoro]] || [[word:rachuyukuoro|rachuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
